description: New Hinge match with detailed profile — loves cooking, has dog named Bruno, farmers market regular
screenshot_description: Hinge profile page. Aisha, 26. Bio: 'chef in training, bruno's mom, probably at a farmers market rn'. Photos show her cooking, at a market, and with a golden retriever. No messages exchanged yet.

description: Bumble match with minimal profile — just a name and one photo at a concert
screenshot_description: Bumble match. Priya, 24. No bio. One photo at what appears to be a music festival, wearing a band tee. No messages yet.

description: Hinge profile with prompts — 'biggest risk I took' and 'I geek out on'
screenshot_description: Hinge profile. Neha, 27. Prompt 1: 'Biggest risk I took: quit my corporate job to start a bakery'. Prompt 2: 'I geek out on: true crime podcasts and sourdough starters'. Photos show her in a bakery and hiking.

description: Tinder match with no bio, photos show travel and a cat
screenshot_description: Tinder profile. Meera, 25. Empty bio. Photos: 1) In front of Eiffel Tower, 2) Holding a tabby cat, 3) Beach sunset selfie, 4) Group photo at a restaurant.

description: Bumble profile with witty/sarcastic bio
screenshot_description: Bumble profile. Riya, 23. Bio: 'swipe right if you can handle someone who thinks she's funnier than she actually is. also i will judge your spotify wrapped'. Photo shows her doing standup at an open mic.

description: Profile shows skydiving, scuba, rock climbing
screenshot_description: Hinge profile. Ananya, 28. Bio: 'adrenaline junkie trying to slow down. mostly failing.' Photos: skydiving, scuba diving with turtles, indoor rock climbing wall. Prompt: 'My simple pleasures: chai and rain'.

description: Profile centered around reading and coffee
screenshot_description: Bumble profile. Kavya, 26. Bio: 'currently reading: project hail mary. previously read: everything brandon sanderson ever wrote. will fight you about fantasy book rankings.' Photo at a bookstore and a coffee shop.

description: Profile shows gym, yoga, healthy lifestyle
screenshot_description: Tinder profile. Simran, 25. Bio: 'gym at 6am, yoga at sunset, pizza at midnight. balance is key.' Photos: gym mirror selfie, yoga pose on a beach, eating pizza.

description: She asked 'so what do you do?' — generic question early in convo
screenshot_description: Bumble chat. 4 messages exchanged. Her: 'haha nice. so what do you do?'. Previous messages were about weekend plans, light casual tone.

description: She mentioned she just started learning pottery
screenshot_description: Hinge chat. She sent: 'just started pottery classes last month and im obsessed lol'. Previous messages were casual getting to know each other.

description: She referenced a meme about being a night owl
screenshot_description: Tinder chat. She sent: 'im such a night owl its actually a problem lol i was up till 4am watching random youtube videos'. Light playful tone throughout.

description: She gave a one-word reply to a question
screenshot_description: Bumble chat. Him: 'do you travel much?' Her: 'yeah'. Him: 'anywhere exciting recently?' Her: 'not really lol'. Tone is flat, low effort from her side.

description: She's talking about her love for street food
screenshot_description: Hinge chat. She sent: 'honestly the best food ive ever had was from this random street vendor in bangkok... nothing fancy just incredible'. She seems enthusiastic.

description: She asked what his plans are for the weekend
screenshot_description: Tinder chat. She sent: 'any fun plans for the weekend?' Casual tone, few messages exchanged so far.

description: She made a self-deprecating joke about her cooking
screenshot_description: Bumble chat. She sent: 'i tried making pasta from scratch yesterday and somehow ended up with glue... like actually inedible glue'. Playful, self-deprecating tone.

description: She mentioned her cat doing something funny
screenshot_description: Hinge chat. She sent: 'my cat just knocked my coffee off the table and then stared at me like it was my fault lol'. Light casual conversation.

description: She sent a flirty message about wanting to meet
screenshot_description: Bumble chat. Good vibes over 10+ messages. She sent: 'okay you're actually funny... most guys on here are so boring'. Clearly interested, light flirting.

description: She sent a suggestive message with eyes emoji
screenshot_description: Tinder chat. Built great chemistry over days. She sent: 'so what are you doing tonight 👀'. Previous messages show mutual attraction and playful banter.

description: She referenced an inside joke from earlier in the conversation
screenshot_description: Hinge chat. She sent: 'okay but this time you better not get lost like last time 😂' — referencing a story he told about getting lost on a hike. Great rapport.

description: They discovered they both love the same obscure band
screenshot_description: Bumble chat. She sent: 'WAIT you listen to khruangbin too?? okay we might actually be the same person'. Very excited tone, lots of energy.

description: They're playfully arguing about pineapple on pizza
screenshot_description: Tinder chat. She sent: 'absolutely not. pineapple on pizza is a war crime and i will die on this hill'. Playful argument energy, both having fun.

description: She gave a genuine compliment about his personality
screenshot_description: Hinge chat. She sent: 'ngl youre one of the few people on here who actually makes me laugh... most convos feel like interviews'. Genuine, warm tone.

description: She's been giving one-word answers for the last 3 messages
screenshot_description: Bumble chat. Last messages: Him: 'do you like traveling?' Her: 'yeah'. Him: 'where's your favorite place?' Her: 'goa'. Him: 'nice! what did you like about it?' Her: 'everything lol'. Pattern of declining effort.

description: She replied after 2 days with just 'haha sorry was busy'
screenshot_description: Tinder chat. His last message was 2 days ago asking about her weekend. She just replied: 'haha sorry was busy'. Short, low effort, delayed response.

description: She's answering but with zero personality
screenshot_description: Hinge chat. Him: 'what kind of music do you like?' Her: 'i listen to everything tbh'. Him: 'any recent favorites?' Her: 'not really just whatever comes on'. Polite but flat.

description: She replied with just 'lol'
screenshot_description: Bumble chat. He told a funny story about his day. She replied with just: 'lol'. Nothing else. Previous messages were somewhat better but trend is downward.

description: She clearly wasn't interested in the topic he chose
screenshot_description: Tinder chat. He asked about her job. She said 'its fine i guess, dont really like talking about work'. Conversation stalled after that.

description: She hasn't replied to his last message sent yesterday
screenshot_description: Hinge chat. His last message yesterday was about a restaurant recommendation. No reply. Previous messages had okay energy but nothing exciting.

description: She challenged 'why should I give you my number'
screenshot_description: Bumble chat. Good conversation so far. He suggested exchanging numbers. She replied: 'hmm why should i give you my number tho'. Playful but testing.

description: She made a sarcastic comment about his bio
screenshot_description: Tinder chat. She sent: 'oh wow another guy who loves travel, the office, and tacos... how original 😴'. Sarcastic but engaging — she's testing his reaction.

description: She said 'convince me you're worth meeting'
screenshot_description: Hinge chat. Decent conversation. She sent: 'okay convince me youre actually worth meeting irl'. Confident, challenging, but interested enough to engage.

description: She negged him playfully about his photo
screenshot_description: Bumble chat. She sent: 'cute dog in your pics... too bad it looks like it has more personality than you 😂'. Playful neg, testing his confidence.

description: She compared him to other guys on the app
screenshot_description: Tinder chat. She sent: 'okay youre like the 5th guy today to use that exact same opener lol'. She's unimpressed but still engaging.

description: She had a terrible day at work
screenshot_description: Hinge chat. They've been chatting for a few days. She sent: 'honestly today was awful... my boss basically humiliated me in front of the whole team and i just want to disappear'. Vulnerable, seeking support.

description: She mentioned family stress
screenshot_description: Bumble chat. Good rapport built over a week. She sent: 'sorry if im quiet today... dealing with some family stuff and its kinda draining'. Not specific, but clearly affected.

description: She expressed insecurity about dating
screenshot_description: Hinge chat. She sent: 'honestly online dating makes me feel so insecure sometimes... like am i even interesting enough for someone to want to meet'. Genuine vulnerability.

description: She briefly mentioned a past relationship
screenshot_description: Tinder chat. During conversation about trust, she said: 'my last relationship kinda messed me up ngl... its hard to be open again after that'. Not asking for advice, just sharing.

description: She's stressed about upcoming exams
screenshot_description: Bumble chat. She sent: 'ugh i have my finals next week and i havent started studying... im literally gonna fail'. Stressed but not deeply sad.

description: Great chemistry, ready to exchange numbers
screenshot_description: Hinge chat. 15+ messages, great banter, shared interests discovered, both clearly enjoying the conversation. Her last message: 'okay you actually might be the most entertaining person ive matched with'.

description: She mentioned loving coffee, perfect moment to ask out
screenshot_description: Bumble chat. She just said: 'honestly i could live off of good coffee... ive tried every cafe in the city at this point'. Good rapport, warm conversation.

description: Trying to ask out but conversation is lukewarm
screenshot_description: Tinder chat. Conversation has been okay but not exciting. She's responding but with medium effort. Her last message: 'yeah that sounds fun'. Direction is ask_out but temperature doesn't support it yet.

description: She mentioned posting something on Instagram
screenshot_description: Hinge chat. She sent: 'omg i just posted the funniest reel on instagram yesterday about exactly this'. Natural opening to move platforms.

description: Deep conversation, perfect time to suggest a call
screenshot_description: Bumble chat. Deep meaningful conversation about life goals. She sent: 'wow this is actually the best conversation ive had on this app... texting doesnt do it justice tho'. She's hinting at more.

description: Too early to ask for number but user wants to try
screenshot_description: Tinder chat. Only 3 messages exchanged. She seems interested but it's still very early. Her last message: 'haha yeah thats a good point'. User selected get_number direction.

description: Girlfriend sent a sweet good morning text
screenshot_description: WhatsApp chat with girlfriend. She sent: 'good morning babe ☀️ hope you slept well. missing you today'. Sweet, warm tone. Established relationship.

description: Planning a date night with partner
screenshot_description: WhatsApp chat. She sent: 'okay so friday night... what are we doing? i need something fun we havent done before'. Playful, excited, looking for suggestions.

description: After a small disagreement, she sent a peace offering
screenshot_description: WhatsApp chat. Previous messages show a minor disagreement about plans. She sent: 'okay i think we were both being dumb about this... truce? 🏳️'. Ready to move past it.

description: Nothing interesting happening, just keeping the connection
screenshot_description: WhatsApp chat. She sent: 'this day is dragging soo much... entertain me'. Bored, looking for engagement, casual relationship tone.

description: She shared exciting news about a promotion
screenshot_description: WhatsApp chat. She sent: 'BABE I GOT THE PROMOTION!!! 🎉🎉🎉 im literally shaking rn i cant believe it'. All caps excitement, huge news.

description: Long distance, she's expressing how much she misses him
screenshot_description: WhatsApp chat. She sent: 'okay this long distance thing is getting harder... i just want to be able to come over and steal your hoodies in person'. Sweet, a bit sad, genuine.
